generatedFrom.derivation: Item Type selects field, battle, equip, and key-item context. Item effect metadata supplies target side and feedback summary. PSI type, direction, name, and PP cost select field and battle context.

itemTypeContexts.label: special passive
itemTypeContexts.summary: Passive or special inventory item. Not command-usable.

itemTypeContexts.label: battle companion
itemTypeContexts.summary: Teddy-bear class. Passive battle companion, not command-usable.

itemTypeContexts.label: broken repair goods
itemTypeContexts.summary: Broken Jeff repair goods. Inert from Use.

itemTypeContexts.label: food
itemTypeContexts.summary: Food and PP sweets. Field and battle consumable.

itemTypeContexts.label: drink or remedy
itemTypeContexts.summary: Drinks, remedies, capsules, and soups. Field and battle consumable.

itemTypeContexts.label: condiment
itemTypeContexts.summary: Condiment class. Field and battle consumable.

itemTypeContexts.label: party food
itemTypeContexts.summary: Large food class. Field and battle consumable.

itemTypeContexts.label: status healer
itemTypeContexts.summary: Status cure, revive, and recovery class. Field and battle usable.

itemTypeContexts.label: battle support tool
itemTypeContexts.summary: Battle-only support or special tool class.

itemTypeContexts.label: field traversal tool
itemTypeContexts.summary: Field-only traversal or trap tool class.

itemTypeContexts.label: story key item
itemTypeContexts.summary: Story key item class. Inert from Use.
